creator: tagattie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192026
A patch from 3.0.0 to 3.1.0.

noti has been updated to 3.1.0.
(https://github.com/variadico/noti/releases/tag/3.1.0)

Summary of changes:
Added
- Pushbullet config key to specify a target device.
Fixed
- --message let's you change the message again.

portlint -AC:
looks fine.
